com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo

Class Supply

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo.Supply

  • public class Supply
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides Supply information
    Since:
    API 5

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  Supply.Capacity
      Retrieves Capacity
      static class  Supply.ConsumableStateAction
      Deprecated. 
      API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
      • getConsumableTypeEnum()
      • getMakeAndModel()
      • getProductNumber()
      • getSerialNumber()
      • getDescription()
      • getMarkerColor()
      • getApproxPercentRemaining()
      • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
      • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
      "

      Deprecated. 
      API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
      • getConsumableTypeEnum()
      • getMakeAndModel()
      • getProductNumber()
      • getSerialNumber()
      • getDescription()
      • getMarkerColor()

      Retrieves PreviousCartridge information

      Retrieves PreviousCartridges information
      class  Supply.RawElabelData
      Deprecated. 
      API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
      • getConsumableTypeEnum()
      • getMakeAndModel()

      • getSerialNumber()
